nodes.title: Show Any (Replaced)
widgets_values: a young woman with pink hair and green eyes sitting on a wooden floor covered in colorful paint splatters. she is in the middle of the image, kneeling on the floor with her hands clasped together in front of her, wearing a white off-the-shoulder t-shirt with the word "bum" printed on it and black shorts. her face is painted with blue and yellow paint, and she has a playful expression with a smile on her face. the room is filled with various art supplies such as paintbrushes, paint cans, and a wooden shelf with more art supplies in the background. the lighting is bright and natural, coming from a window behind her, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

nodes.title: Show Any (original)
widgets_values: A vibrant and colorful anime-style digital illustration from a front camera angle, depicting a young woman with pink hair and green eyes sitting on a wooden floor covered in colorful paint splatters. she is in the middle of the image, kneeling on the floor with her hands clasped together in front of her, wearing a white off-the-shoulder t-shirt with the word "bum" printed on it and black shorts. her face is painted with blue and yellow paint, and she has a playful expression with a smile on her face. the room is filled with various art supplies such as paintbrushes, paint cans, and a wooden shelf with more art supplies in the background. the lighting is bright and natural, coming from a window behind her, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.
